global_mistakes.title: Hardcoded wait using time.sleep
global_mistakes.description: Use of time.sleep() instead of dynamic waits can lead to flaky and slow tests.
global_mistakes.recommendation: Replace time.sleep() with WebDriverWait and expected_conditions.

occurrences.note: Detected in one or more functions using static wait

global_mistakes.title: Missing assertion in test functions
global_mistakes.description: Test functions do not contain assertions, making them ineffective for validation.
global_mistakes.recommendation: Ensure each test function contains at least one assert statement.

occurrences.note: Detected in one or more test functions without assertions
